_note: ONLINE-MODE example — premium servers (e.g. Aternos with online-mode=true). auth=microsoft logs in a REAL Microsoft account; on first npm start mineflayer prints a device-code link to authorize. IMPORTANT: each bot needs its OWN paid account, so online mode is effectively ONE bot — keep maxWorkers 1. Put your MS account email in 'username'. Copy to config.json and edit. (Tip: set the Aternos server's online-mode to false and use the offline config to get the whole crew.)
systemPrompt: You are a Minecraft helper bot. Short, casual, lowercase game chat. Do your job; never say you are an AI; no markdown.
